gate_role: held-out full-census H0-E-v4 occupational-occurrence Gate; success qualifies H0-E-v4 and H0 and permits a separately frozen H1a, while failure stops H1a/H1b and H2-H6

rationale.held_out_role: O0-v2 used a 64-row mechanism-locating panel and cannot establish coverage; O1 is the complete disjoint remainder of the original v1 zero-candidate universe after versioned material cleaning
rationale.census_not_sample: all 835 eligible held-out rows are evaluated, so no occupational coverage is extrapolated from a smaller sample and no O0 parent-space-group outcome enters selection
rationale.aggregate_coverage: the cleaned 1,023-row universe is partitioned into 125 already-qualified v1 materials, 63 O0 rows and 835 O1 rows; O0 contributes 10 distinct new materials, so at least 19 O1 materials are required to reach ceil(0.15*1023)=154
rationale.physical_scope: ordered stoichiometric crystals with integer elements, det(B)<=4 maximal t/k embeddings, a species-free parent geometry carrier and an exact occupational stabilizer; defects, partial occupancy, dummy species and tolerance expansion remain forbidden
rationale.no_multiplicity_bias: material coverage counts each material once; canonical physical-path coverage separately counts unique material plus E0 embedding keys and never promotes repeated source rows or affine duplicates into extra material coverage

mathematical_contract.coloring: a in {1,...,118}^N with every terminal site assigned exactly one physical element
mathematical_contract.occupational_stabilizer: H_a={g in G^B : P_g a = a}
mathematical_contract.terminal_subgroup: H_child=H_a intersect H_modes intersect H_strain intersect H_residual
mathematical_contract.canonical_material_path: (material_id,E0_embedding_key); repeated source multiplicity and enumeration order have zero measure effect
mathematical_contract.ordered_composition: the terminal coloring is an output; target composition and target species mapping are forbidden model inputs

selection.source: full 1,024-row frozen v1 pilot in frozen selection.parquet order
selection.rule: apply parent_occurrence_quarantine_v2, remove all 125 v1 candidate materials, then remove the complete 64-ID O0 source panel; retain every remaining zero-candidate nonfailure row

setting_and_search.candidate_edges: all source-certified, multiplicity-corrected E0 maximal-t index-1 and maximal-k index-2--4 embeddings for each child setting
setting_and_search.geometry_assignment: one internal carrier class on every site with a complete parent-supercell permutation group law
setting_and_search.occupational_assignment: observed integer species are terminal output labels used only to calculate the exact coloring stabilizer
setting_and_search.strict_parent_identification: spglib on the unlabeled geometry carrier using one internal nonphysical equivalence label

advancement_rule: O1 success qualifies H0-E-v4 and, together with frozen H0-A through H0-D-v2, qualifies H0 and permits only a separately frozen H1a protocol. Any O1 failure is frozen and stops H1a/H1b and H2-H6. No result changes the thresholds or decisions of H0-E-v1/v2/v3 or O0-v2.
